title: Notification No.46/2002-Cus(NT),dt. 25.07.2002
text: 25th July,2002 Notification No. 46/2002 - Customs (N.T.) In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (1) of Section 4 of the Customs Act, 1962 (52 of 1962), the Central Board of Excise and Customs hereby appoints the Commissioner of Customs, Inland Container Depot, Tughlakabad, New Delhi to be the Commissioner of Customs(Port), Kolkata, Commissioner of Customs, Kandla, or, as the case may be, Commissioner of Customs (Imports), Mumbai for the purpose of adjudicating the show cause notice No.50D/25/98-CI, dated 11th February, 2002 issued by the Additional Director General, Directorate of Revenue Intelligence, New Delhi to the below mentioned parties, namely :- 1 M/s. Padmini Polymers Ltd., A-81, Okhla Industrial Area, Phase- II, New Delhi. 2 Shri Vivek Nagpal, Chairman-cum-Managing Director, M/s. Padmini Polymers Ltd., A-81, Okhla Industrial Area, Phase- II, New Delhi. 3 M/s.Adani Exports Ltd., Adani House, Nr. Mithakhali Circle, Navrangpura, Ahmedabad- 380 009 4 M/s.Gujarat Small Industries Corporation Ltd., Bhagwati Chambers, Opposite Gujarat Vidyapith, Ashram Road, Ahmedabad- 380 014. 5 M/s.Kurukshetra Oriya Daily, A-18, Commercial Estate, Rourkela. 6 M/s.Cassette Shoppe, B-51, Connaught Place, New Delhi. 7 M/s.M.S.Industrial Products, J-43, A, NDSE.I, New Delhi - 110 049. 8 M/s.Garh Traang, 1546, Jawahar Colony, NIT, Faridabad - 121 005, Haryana. 9 M/s.Scanage Reprographers(P) Ltd., 2E, Caxton House, Jhandewalan Extension, New Delhi- 110 055. 10 M/s.Nagina Enterprises, 4th Floor, Saini Building, 3007, Bahadurgarh Road, New Delhi- 110 006. 1 M/s.Rakesh Enterprises, 2241/35, Sadar Jawahar Singh Market, 1st Floor, Kunchehelan, New Delhi. 2 M/s.Narsingh &Co., 2241/35, Sadar Jawahar Singh Market, 1st Floor, Kunchehelan, New Delhi. 3 M/s.OPCL Solvents, M-105, Connaught Circus, New Delhi. 4 M/s.Sultan Chand Vimal Prakash Pvt. Ltd., 9/10, EFG, Mohd Pur, Majn Village, Delhi. 5 M/s.Jagriti Plastics Pvt. Ltd., 107 MG House, Community Center, Wazirpur Industrial Area, New Delhi. 6 M/s.Subham Dies & Chemicals, 931, Gali Telian, Tilak Bazar, New Delhi. 7 M/s.Organo Chem Ind., 11 Sawan Bhawan, 89 Nai Gaon, Cross Road, Dadar(E), Mumbai. 8 Ajay Plastics Industries, 95-96, Sahzada Bagh, Old Rohtak Road, New Delhi. -- 1 of 2 -- 9 M/s.Mansi Chemicals, 8 Shyam Kunj, D.S.Lane, Mathur Das Road, Kandivali(W), Mumbai. 10 M/s.Nai Rashtriya Dara, 10 Gurudwara Road, Jawahar Colony, NIT, Faridabad - 121 005, Haryana.
